channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: National Council Takes Legal Action Against Durban Clothing Manufacturer Over Labour Violations
item.description: The National Bargaining Council for the Clothing Manufacturing Industry has initiated court proceedings against Durban-based fashion supplier Gemelli Pty Ltd, alleging it contracts with sweatshops dis...

item.title: VP Sara Duterte expresses support for Bato dela Rosa amid Senate controversy
item.description: Vice President Sara Duterte expressed her support for Senator Ronald “Bato” dela Rosa amid recent tensions in the Senate. Speaking from The Hague, Duterte said she was saddened and angered by the perc...

item.title: Ondo South APC Youth Group Backs Princess Catherine Odu for Senate
item.description: The Ondo State chapter of the Renewed Hope Youth Alliance don officially throw their support behind Princess Catherine Odu, the former Secretary to the State Government, to represent Ondo South Senato...

item.title: Analysis of the Baloch Insurgency and Its Impact on Pakistan’s Security
item.description: In late April 2026, Baloch insurgents carried out 27 attacks in Balochistan, Pakistan, killing at least 42 military personnel. Authorities later foiled a suicide bombing plot in Islamabad, highlightin...

item.title: Cambridge delays A-level Maths exam in Pakistan after paper leak
item.description: KARACHI: Cambridge International Education (CIE) has announced the postponement of the A-level mathematics paper 32 (9709) in Pakistan after the recent leak of AS-level mathematics paper 52 (9709). Th...

item.title: Parliamentary standards inquiry launched into Nigel Farage over £5m gift
item.description: The Parliamentary Standards Commissioner has initiated an investigation to determine whether Reform UK leader Nigel Farage breached House of Commons rules by failing to declare a £5 million gift from ...

item.title: California GOP gubernatorial candidate misidentifies Del Taco item during campaign stop
item.description: Steve Hilton, a Republican candidate for California governor and former Fox News host closely allied with former President Donald Trump, faced widespread criticism after misidentifying a taco during a...

item.title: Tamil Nadu Assembly Conducts Floor Test to Decide Government's Stability
item.description: The Tamil Nadu Legislative Assembly recently held a floor test to determine the stability of the state government. Key political parties involved in this crucial session included the AIADMK, DMK, VCK,...

item.title: Ahmedabad-Dholera Semi High-Speed Railway Project Approved, Travel Time Reduced to 48 Minutes
item.description: The Cabinet Committee on Economic Affairs (CCEA), chaired by Prime Minister Narendra Modi, has approved the ₹20,667 crore Ahmedabad (Sarkhej) to Dholera Semi High-Speed Double Line project. Spanning 1...

item.title: Visual similarity between words and their meanings speeds up reading
item.description: Recent research has explored how the visual appearance of words can influence how quickly and accurately we process them. Known as 'iconicity', this phenomenon has traditionally been studied in sounds...

item.title: A Rare 1913 Talbot 15hp Works Hill-Climber: Icon of Early British Motorsport
item.description: The 1913 Talbot 15hp (20/30hp) Works Hill-Climber represents one of the most remarkable examples of early British motorsport engineering. Produced by the Clement-Talbot factory specifically for compet...

item.title: Tucson Hosts Iranian Football Team Amid Global Tensions
item.description: Despite ongoing tensions between the US, Israel, and Iran, the city of Tucson in Arizona is preparing to host Iran's national football team, Team Melli, for the upcoming World Cup. The Kino Sports Com...

item.title: Tanzania Resolves Most Union Issues, Improving Zanzibar’s Economic and International Engagement
item.description: Deputy Minister of State in the Vice-President’s Office (Union and Environment), Reuben Kwagilwa, announced that 15 out of 18 ongoing Union matters between Tanzania and Zanzibar have been successfully...

item.title: Cruise ship passengers held in France amid suspected stomach flu outbreak
item.description: Over a thousand passengers aboard a British cruise ship have been prevented from disembarking while docked in France due to a suspected outbreak of stomach flu. Health authorities on the French coast ...

item.title: Curiosity Rover’s Drill Got Stuck on Mars Rock and Was Safely Freed
item.description: On April 25, 2026, NASA’s Curiosity rover encountered an unusual problem while drilling a rock on Mars, nicknamed “Atacama.” Unlike previous drilling incidents that caused minor cracks, the entire 28....

item.title: Trump Arrives in Beijing for Summit Without Presidential Greeting from Xi Jinping
item.description: President Donald Trump arrived in Beijing for a high-stakes diplomatic summit with Chinese President Xi Jinping, but the visit started with a notable absence: Xi did not greet Trump at the airport. In...

item.title: Nvidia CEO Participates in China Trip Alongside Former President Trump
item.description: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang joined former President Donald Trump's trip to Beijing, despite initially being left off the White House's list of executive attendees. This unexpected inclusion has sparked di...

item.title: Scientists Develop Method to Measure Elusive W States in Quantum Systems
item.description: Researchers from Kyoto University and Hiroshima University have achieved a significant milestone in quantum technology by developing a method to instantly detect W states, a complex form of multi-phot...

item.title: Ngizwe Mchunu denies arson as community rallies support for burnt home
item.description: Outspoken podcaster and anti-illegal immigration activist Ngizwe Mchunu has denied claims that he was behind the torching of his home in Mbumbulu, south of Durban. The fire reportedly occurred while M...

item.title: Marjorie Taylor Greene responds to false accusations by MAGA podcaster Benny Johnson
item.description: Marjorie Taylor Greene, former U.S. Representative and prominent MAGA figure, publicly criticized right-wing podcaster Benny Johnson after he made unverified claims about her. Johnson alleged that Gre...
